caption: A presentation slide titled "Overview" is displayed against a red header. The slide features a complex diagram connecting several visual elements. On the left, an image of an elephant is shown, with an arrow pointing from a small photo of a classroom toward it. Above the elephant is a bar chart titled "Additional school years gained per $100 spent" and a histogram labeled "Absolute returns (Unit: Korea)" and "number of people." Below the elephant, a curved arrow leads to a list of terms: "Indirect social psych," "Norms," "Sacred Values," "Empathy," and "Dehumanization." At the bottom, a small image of a face is connected by an arrow to the text "Retrospective: measure" and "Prospective: predict." As the sequence progresses, a black arrow appears, pointing upward from the "Retrospective: measure" text toward the list of social psychological terms.
